use_cases: Creative portfolio websites requiring interactive cursor effects
Modern SaaS landing pages wanting polished user experience
Gaming and entertainment sites with custom navigation
Premium brand experiences with attention to micro-interactions
E-commerce sites wanting distinctive brand identity
ai_summary: A customizable cursor replacement component offering 6 distinct styles including arrow pointer, big circle, ring with dot, combined circle-dot, glitch effect, and motion blur. Built with hover state detection to identify interactive elements, smooth position interpolation creating trailing effects, and optional SVG filter effects for glitch animations. Delivered as a lightweight React component with configuration props for cursor type, color, size, and glitch color customization.
